home.title: Alle Veranstaltungen auf einen Blick
home.description: Bereitschaft, Blocker, Fristen und nächste Schritte – Genehmigungen, Anbieter, Personal und Unterlagen an einem Ort.
home.readinessDetail: Durchschnittlicher Fortschritt über Checkliste und Dokumente.
home.blockersDetail: Offene Blocker, die noch Nachverfolgung erfordern.
home.emptyDescription: Erste Veranstaltung anlegen, um Anforderungen, Fristen und Dokumenten-Tracking zu generieren.

blockers.title: Aktuelle Blocker
blockers.emptyDescription: Die Veranstaltung hat keine aktiven Blocker auf Basis der aktuellen Anforderungen und Dokumente.
blockers.waiting: Wartet auf externe Rückmeldung, bevor es weitergehen kann.
blockers.actionRequired: Veranstalter-Handlung für diese Anforderung noch erforderlich.
blockers.missingDocument: Ein erforderliches Dokument ist als fehlend markiert.

nextActions.title: Nächste Schritte
nextActions.empty: Alle offenen Punkte sind derzeit erledigt.

checklistPage.missingDescription: Die angeforderte Checkliste existiert nicht im lokalen Speicher.
checklistPage.title: Generierte Anforderungen
checklistPage.description: Status und Notizen aktualisieren, während die Arbeit von Planung zur Umsetzung fortschreitet.

documentsPage.missingDescription: Der angeforderte Dokumenten-Workspace existiert nicht im lokalen Speicher.
documentsPage.title: Nachweise zur Arbeit zuordnen
documentsPage.description: Dateien anlegen, als hochgeladen oder fehlend markieren und mit den zugehörigen Checklisten-Einträgen verknüpfen.
documentsPage.emptyDescription: Erstes Dokument hinzufügen, um Genehmigungen, Versicherungen, Pläne und weitere Dateien mit Anforderungen zu verknüpfen.

documentForm.title: Dokumenttitel

documentItem.notesPlaceholder: Upload-Status, Zuständigkeit oder fehlende Details vermerken…

notFound.title: Seite nicht gefunden

wizard.title: Veranstaltung anlegen und Checkliste generieren
wizard.description: Grunddaten erfassen, Risikofaktoren markieren und die automatisch erzeugten Anforderungen prüfen.
wizard.organizerIntro: Diese Angaben werden für die offizielle Veranstaltungsanmeldung benötigt. Die Personalausweisnummer ist für das spätere PostIdent-Verfahren relevant.
wizard.organizerPrivacyText: Ihre Daten werden ausschließlich lokal gespeichert und nicht an Dritte übertragen.

mapPicker.title: Ort auf Beispielkarte auswählen
mapPicker.subtitle: Dies ist eine Demo-Karte mit Beispielorten. Die Auswahl wird als Veranstaltungsort gespeichert.

services.intro: Wählen Sie benötigte Dienstleister direkt aus. Aktivieren Sie eine Kategorie und wählen Sie Ihren Anbieter.

publicVenue: Straßenbereich, Platz oder Park in städtischem Besitz.
noParking: Skizze beifügen. Kosten für Beschilderung möglich.
highRisk: Löst Sicherheits-, Rettungs- und Sanitätskonzept aus.

wizard.documentsIntro: Basierend auf Ihren Angaben werden folgende Unterlagen benötigt. Die Liste aktualisiert sich automatisch.
wizard.feeIntro: Orientierung nach dem städtischen Gebührentarif für Sondernutzungen.
rules: Großveranstaltung / hohes Risiko → Rettungs-, Brand- & Sanitätskonzept

home.title: All events in one place
home.description: Readiness, blockers, deadlines, and next steps – permits, vendors, staffing, and documents in one place.
home.readinessDetail: Average progress across checklist and documents.
home.blockersDetail: Open blockers that still need follow-up.
home.emptyDescription: Create your first event to generate requirements, deadlines, and document tracking.

blockers.title: Current blockers
blockers.emptyDescription: This event has no active blockers based on its current requirements and documents.
blockers.waiting: Waiting on an external update before it can move forward.
blockers.actionRequired: Organizer action is still required for this requirement.
blockers.missingDocument: A required document is marked as missing.

nextActions.title: Next actions
nextActions.empty: Everything requiring action is complete for now.

checklistPage.missingDescription: The requested checklist does not exist in local storage.
checklistPage.title: Generated requirements
checklistPage.description: Update statuses and notes as work moves from planning to execution.

documentsPage.missingDescription: The requested documents workspace does not exist in local storage.
documentsPage.title: Attach documents to the work
documentsPage.description: Add files, mark them uploaded or missing, and link them to the related checklist items.
documentsPage.emptyDescription: Add the first document to link permits, insurance, plans, and other files to requirements.

documentForm.title: Document title
documentForm.notesPlaceholder: What is included, who owns it, and what is still missing?

requirementItem.notesPlaceholder: Capture follow-ups, owners, or waiting reasons…

wizard.title: Create an event and generate its checklist
wizard.description: Capture the basics, flag risk factors, and review the automatically generated requirements.
wizard.organizerIntro: These details are required for the official event registration. The ID number is relevant for the later identity verification process.
wizard.organizerPrivacyText: Your data is stored locally only and is not shared with third parties.

fields.eventNamePlaceholder: Lantern walk, street festival, summer night event…
fields.locationPlaceholder: Market square, town hall, club grounds…
fields.processionRoutePlaceholder: Start at Peace Square → Main Street → Old Market

mapPicker.emptyLocation: Choose a location on the map
mapPicker.emptyAddress: Choose an address on the map
mapPicker.title: Choose a location on the demo map
mapPicker.subtitle: This is a demo map with sample places. The selected place will be saved as the event location.

marketSquare.name: Old Market, Dortmund
marketSquare.detail: Central square for markets and neighborhood gatherings.

riversidePark.name: Phoenix Lake Promenade
riversidePark.detail: Open waterfront area with strong foot traffic.

communityHall.name: North City Community Hall
communityHall.detail: Community-focused indoor and outdoor event space.

services.intro: Choose the service providers you need. Activate a category and select your preferred provider.

publicVenue: Street area, square, or park owned by the city.
privateVenue: Club grounds, private property, or rented hall.
streetClosure: Attach a sketch. Additional costs may apply.
noParking: Attach a sketch. Signage costs may apply.
music: May require a GEMA license and sound concept.
alcohol: Requires alcohol permit and vendor obligations.
flyingStructures: Tents, stages, stands – inspection book required.
highRisk: Triggers security, rescue, fire, and medical planning.

wizard.documentsIntro: Based on your inputs, the following documents are required. The list updates automatically.
wizard.feeIntro: Orientation based on the municipal fee schedule for special use.
rules: Music = yes → GEMA license + sound concept if needed
Public space = yes → city approval + special use application
Street closure = yes → closure application + sketch
No-parking zones = yes → setup application + sketch
Public transport affected = yes → coordinate with transit operator
Large event / high risk → rescue, fire, and medical concept
Temporary structures = yes → inspection book required
Vendors = yes → vendor coordination + participant list

zones.zone_1: Zone I – city center / pedestrian zone

confirmVenue: Clarify contact person, access times, and conditions.
budgetReview: Account for cleaning, overtime, barriers, power, and reserves.
staffingPlan: Plan setup, entry, runners, and teardown.
marketingPlan: Define channels, timeline, and target audience.
insuranceReview: Confirm organizer liability and required certificates.
runOfShow: Document setup, opening, main phase, and teardown.
requiredDocs: Event registration, organizer declaration, insurance, site plan, and toilet proof.
alcoholPermit: Clarify serving rules, closing times, and responsibilities.
cityApproval: Obtain city / public order office approval
Coordinate site access, safety, and conditions.
specialUse: Match the use type: info stand / product display / street cafe / parking space.
streetClosure: Attach a sketch with detours. Additional costs may apply.
noParking: Attach a sketch. Signage costs may apply.
transitCoordination: Specify affected lines and coordinate with the transit provider.
processionRegistration: Attach sketch, route table, and participant count.
securityConcept: Plan staffing, access, escape routes, and crowd management.
rescueFireConcept: Create rescue and fire safety concept
Cover rescue routes, fire department access, and fire protection measures.
fundingApplication: Prepare sponsorship concept, budget annex, and fallback plan.
vendorCoordination: Track contracts, power connections, and certificates.
temporaryStructures: Prepare list, plan, and inspection book for permit-relevant structures.

doc-req-event-form: Fully completed form for registering the event.
doc-req-liability-declaration: Liability assumption for special use of public areas.
doc-req-liability-insurance: Proof of valid organizer liability insurance.
doc-req-site-plan: Scale 1:500, A3 format, all structures drawn to scale.
doc-req-toilets: Number of women’s, men’s, and accessible toilets.
doc-req-special-use-permit: Appropriate for use type: info stand / product display / street cafe / parking space.
doc-req-participant-list: Type and size of stalls and rides.
doc-req-steward-plan: Deployment plan for stewards and security staff.
doc-req-flying-structures: Temporary structures list, plan, and inspection book
For permit-relevant structures such as tents, stages, and stands.
doc-req-street-closure-sketch: Site plan of planned street closures with detours.
doc-req-no-parking-sketch: Site plan of required no-parking zones.
doc-req-procession-route: Sketch, route table, and expected participant count.
doc-req-security-concept: Comprehensive security concept for the event.
doc-req-rescue-fire: Concept for rescue routes and fire protection measures.
doc-req-steward-plan-extended: Extended deployment plan for large events.
doc-req-sound-concept: Sound system concept when audio equipment is used.
doc-req-stvo-declaration: Declaration for use of public traffic areas.
doc-req-insurance-2600k: Proof of liability insurance with minimum coverage amount.
